{"id":"smallhold-na7","title":"Mention parser: @user@domain and @user, link and create mention rows","description":"Parse @mentions from post text. Patterns: @username@domain (remote) and @username (local). For each mention: resolve to an account (local lookup or remote resolution), create a mentions table row, replace mention in content_html with a mention anchor tag. Create mention notifications for local accounts mentioned.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to collect mention parsing edge cases from the fediverse. Spawn a parallel subagent to implement the parser.

Test discipline:
- '@gargron@mastodon.social' in text → link to mastodon.social profile URL
- '@localuser' → link to local profile, mention row created, notification created
- '@user.' with trailing period → parse 'user', ignore period
- mention inside backtick code block → NOT parsed
- Test notification deduplication: mentioning same user twice → one notification, not two

Defensive programming:
- Regex for mention parsing: compile once at startup (lazy_static or once_cell), not per-request
- Remote mention resolution failure: include mention in content_html as plain text
- Rate limit: maximum 10 unique mentions per post (prevent mention storms)","acceptance_criteria":"Mentions parsed and linked; trailing punctuation stripped; code block mentions ignored; notifications created for local mentions; max 10 mentions enforced","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:33:14Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:33:14Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-0ix","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:33:21Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
